name: Guangdong Yueyun Transportation Company Limited
summary: Guangdong Yueyun Transportation Company Limited, an investment holding company, provides integrated transportation and logistics services in the People's Republic of China. The company offers road passenger transportation and auxiliary services, such as urban passenger transportation, public transportation, cross-border transportation, and passenger and freight station services. It also operates gas stations, charging stations, and retail convenience stores. In addition, the company engages in expressway toll collection business; advertising media business; and suppling construction materials. Further, it is involved in the advertising, real estate leasing, fuel retail, general freight, property management, vehicle inspection and testing, and motor driver training businesses; and sale of vehicle spare parts. Additionally, the company offers logistics, tourism, commercial, hotel, and business services, as well as develops and sells smart cards and electronic payment systems. The company was formerly known as Guangdong Nan Yue Logistics Company Limited and changed its name to Guangdong Yueyun Transportation Company Limited in August 2013. Guangdong Yueyun Transportation Company Limited was founded in 1999 and is based in Hong Kong, Hong Kong. Guangdong Yueyun Transportation Company Limited is a subsidiary of Guangdong Provincial Communication Group Company Limited.
